1.0: Mmm, I can't seem to fall asleep...
1.1:
My stomach hurts... Is it indigestion?
Maybe that dinner was too much after all...
1.3:
It's still the middle of the night.
I can sleep a bit more...\w[30].\w[30].\w[30].
Should I go check on \str[120]?
1.8: W-What? Oh, it was just a nightmare...
1.9:
That scared me so bad... 
I think I saw a really terrifying version of \str[120].
1.10:
…I should go check on \str[120].
What if that dream—
1.11:
Yeah, that dream was so scary...
It’s better to get some rest early...
2.0:
\c[10]—Data update request detected from version \str[1].  \w[60]
Would you like to perform the auto-update now?
2.2:
...Is it morning already? 
I feel like I had some kind of dream about 
\str[120], 
but I can’t remember it...
2.3:
...Is it already morning? 
I don't feel like I slept well...
2.4: Ah, is it morning already? I slept so well.
2.5:
It's a nice day today...\w[45]huh? 
Feels like the sunlight’s a bit too intense?
2.7: The weather doesn't look so great today.
2.8:
Is it raining? 
I hope it won't affect our adventure...
2.9:
Haven’t checked on \str[120] for a few days… 
Guess I should drop by today.
2.10: Alright, I'm up. What’s the plan for today—
2.13:
Okay, time to get everything in order 
and head out for an adventure!
3.0:
My mind slowly clears... 
I finally realize I'm not in my usual bedroom.
Something warm and soft is pressed tight against me, 
their breathing rhythmic and gentle.
3.1:
It's just \str[120]...
Memories begin to flood back—         \w[120]
Right, the two of us were tangled together 
until deep into the night...
3.2:
Looking at her defenseless sleeping face, 
still bearing a faint flush of last night's afterglow,
I can't help but reach out, my fingertips sinking softly 
into her hair, smooth as silk.
3.4:
As if sensing the affection, she lets out a hazy, 
satisfied hum, subconsciously nuzzling into my palm.
3.5: "It's morning already. Can you get up?"
3.6:
I gently nudge her shoulder, 
trying to wake her from her slumber.
3.7:
After her long eyelashes flutter a few times, 
she finally opens her eyes slowly.
 
 
She stares blankly into the void for a moment,
then tilts her head to look at me right beside her, 
her pupils filled with the haze of sleep.
3.8:
\nl< >"Eh... \str[121]...?     \w[150]
Why... are you in bed too...?"
3.9:
It seems her brain hasn't quite finished booting up. 
she just tilts her head, staring at me foolishly for a long time.
3.10:
Not until the fragmented memories of last night 
piece themselves back together does the blood rush 
to her cheeks at a visible speed.
3.11:
\nl< >"Uu... ♥                   \w[120]
G-good morning... \str[121]...    \w[120]
About last night... um... thank you..."
3.12:
Completely at a loss as to how to handle such a bashful 
predicament, she just lowers her head,
whispering a word of thanks that was somewhat nonsensical.
3.13:
The atmosphere becomes subtle and cramped.
We silently dress with our backs to each other, 
then, maintaining an indescribable tacit understanding,
we walk into the washroom together.
3.14:
\nl< >"...Mmuu... nya...♥         \w[120]
\str[121]... not there... it's no good..."
3.15:
She only let out a muffled murmur, 
clutching her pillow and burying her face even deeper.
3.16:
Though I'm curious what kind of wonderful dream she's having, 
since she's still so sound asleep,
it's better not to force her awake...
3.17:
Last night's exertion was too much of a burden for her after all,
I should let her sleep a bit longer...
3.18:
Holding my breath, 
I gently peel away her arm still wrapped around me,
leaving the warm bed without making a single sound.
3.19:
Taking one last look at her quiet profile, 
slightly pale in the morning light,
I quietly exit the room and softly click the door shut.
3.20:
Watching her defenseless sleeping face though I know she needs rest,
the quiet unique to this morning and the scent 
she radiates keep provoking my sanity.
3.21:
I meant to just pat her head, 
but my fingertips involuntarily slide down her slender neck.
From her rounded shoulder to the slight curve of her waist, 
I greedily feel every inch of her skin.
3.23:
Even as she slept, her body that had just shed its innocence 
was already reacting to my touch.
She let out a few unconscious whimpers as she felt 
the warmth radiating from my fingertips.
3.24:
...No! What am I thinking!
How could I do this to her so early in the morning...
I'd better just get up!
3.26:
My consciousness was still drifting on the edge of a hazy fog,
when clear, soft whispers reached my ears, 
accompanied by intermittent touches on my cheek.
3.27:
\nl< >"Poke... poke...      \w[150]
\str[121] just won't wake up at all..."
3.28:
It felt as if someone beside me was tirelessly tapping 
and poking at my face.
3.29:
"Pinch... Now your nose is caught...        \w[150]
How many seconds can you hold out, \str[121]~?"
3.29.2:
My breathing became difficult in an instant.
I could feel someone pinching my nostrils with two fingers,
and I could even hear her shallow, 
rapid breaths as she stifled a laugh.
3.29.4:
............It's \str[120], isn't it?
Memories began to flood back—
Right, we ended up sleeping together last night.
3.30:
I was surprised she had woken up before me,
but facing such a cute prank, 
I didn't intend to expose myself just yet.
3.31:
I secretly took a deep breath through my mouth, 
which wasn't restricted,
then concentrated all my energy on my nose 
and blew out a sudden, sharp gust of air!
3.33:
The sudden force acted like a miniature air pump, 
instantly popping her fingers off.
Not expecting this, \str[120] let out a cry that 
was a mix of startle and excitement.
3.34:
\nl< >"...But he's still not awake~     \w[120]
How strange, was that just a sneeze?"
3.36:
Seeing that I remained unresponsive with my eyes closed, 
she leaned in with a hint of frustration,
her fingers restlessly testing the edges of my lips once more.
3.38:
The moment her fingertips neared my mouth again,
I seized the opportunity and snapped my jaw open, 
taking the whole finger inside.
3.39:
\{\nl< >"Wueeeeee~~!? I got bitten—    \w[90]
No, I'm being licked~~!"
3.40:
\nl< >"\str[121]! 
You've been awake this whole time, haven't you~!   \w[90]
Let go of my hand already~~!"
3.41:
Having been countered for the second time,
\str[120] let out another startled squeak.
By now, she clearly realized she had been played 
from the very beginning.
3.42:
"Impudent girl!
To dare trespass into the dragon's lair,
prepare yourself to be devoured!"
3.43:
Feeling the timing was right, I snapped my eyes open.
Even with her finger still in my mouth, 
I deliberately used a deep, gravelly voice to let out a monster-like growl.
3.44:
\nl< >"I'm not afraid of that one bit~!
The Great Evil Dragon was sleeping like a log just a second ago...!"
3.45:
\str[120] squirmed and struggled under the covers, 
reacting to the slick, ticklish sensation against her finger.
In her clear, satisfied giggles, there wasn't a single trace of fear.
3.46:
This defenseless, completely vulnerable appearance of hers
caused the desire suppressed through the night to 
swell to its peak at this very moment—
3.47: "Rawr—! The Dragon is on the move!"
3.48:
\nl< >"Hahahaha... it tickles!
\str[121]... stop it!
Not there... ha, haha!"
3.49:
...Today will surely be another peaceful and tranquil day.
I kept licking the side of her neck and ear, 
which had grown hot from her blushing.
\w[30]
Listening to her lovely laughter, 
I prayed from the bottom of my heart that 
this life could last forever...
4.1:
My head feels dizzy... 
Did I just fall asleep like that last night...?
4.2:
"I can't remember what happened last night...  \w[90]
Oh well, I was probably just too exhausted."
